title: rafnia cuneifolia var. obovata
intro: Rafnia cuneifolia var. obovata is a type of plant, also known as Rafnia, that belongs to the Fabaceae family and is native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in digestion. Rafnia is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can be used as a herbal remedy in the form of teas, tinctures, or infusions.
